overall.description: A stationary first-person view from a futuristic cyberpunk apartment bedroom at night, featuring a bed and a wall-mounted television cycling through various colorful advertisements and programs. The scene is from Cyberpunk 2077 with dark atmospheric lighting and rain visible outside the window blinds.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with entertainment screen

events.description: television screen switches from red sports car advertisement to cyan news data broadcast
television displays bright yellow All Foods commercial with animated character
television changes to anime-style cartoon with pink monkey character

agents.ego_description: lying on bed watching television in a dark apartment while rain falls outside the window

entered.detail: low platform bed with messy white sheets and scattered pillows
large window with horizontal blinds showing rainy neon-lit city outside
large flatscreen TV displaying cycling advertisements and neon graphics
curved ceiling with horizontal wooden slats and recessed spot lighting
red neon light fixture mounted on the wall behind the television

segments.scene_description: A static first-person view from a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom at night. The camera rests on a platform bed facing a wall-mounted television that continuously cycles through various advertisements including sports cars, news broadcasts, food commercials, and anime programming. Outside the rain-streaked window, the glow of a neon-lit city is visible through the blinds, while the room is illuminated by the shifting colors of the TV screen and accent lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a futuristic cyberpunk bedroom, where the atmosphere is defined by the shifting light of a digital display. It begins with a view from a platform bed facing a wall-mounted television that continuously cycles through a rapid succession of sports cars, news broadcasts, food commercials, and anime. As the screen flickers, the room's interior lighting transforms, casting alternating colorful glows across the dark furniture and walls. The scene remains anchored in this moody interior, while the rain-streaked window blinds in the background allow the steady, neon luminescence of the city to bleed into the room.
